# Obama Mulondo Victor

**Full-Stack Frontend Developer & Network Systems Engineer**  
College Appec Remera-Rukoma • Based in Rwanda

## Professional Identity

Hi, I'm Obama Mulondo Victor. I build responsive, secure web apps and engineer resilient network architectures. I am a Software Development Student at College Appec Remera-Rukoma and a Junior Frontend Developer specializing in Next.js, Vue 3, and Tailwind CSS.

## Portfolio & Social Links

- **Portfolio:** https://victor-co-rw.vercel.app/
- **GitHub:** https://github.com/OBAMAMULONDO
- **Instagram:** [To be implemented]

## Technical Skills

### Frontend & UI Engineering
- Next.js (App Router, SSR, Server Actions)
- Vue 3 (Composition API, Vite, Pinia)
- Tailwind CSS (Utility Classes, Flexbox/Grid)
- JavaScript (ES6+, Async/Await, Fetch API)

### Backend, Cloud & Databases
- Node.js (Server-side runtime, REST API engineering)
- Supabase (Realtime database, PostgreSQL, OAuth/JWT)
- MongoDB (Document indexing, unstructured data)
- PHP (Server-side processing, legacy infrastructure)

### Systems & Network Infrastructure
- Linux System Administration (Debian & Kali Linux)
- Network Analysis (Wireshark, packet capturing, protocol decoding)
- Network Simulation (Cisco Packet Tracer, VLAN topologies)

## Featured Projects

### INB Construction and Supply Ltd
Full-Stack Enterprise Platform for commercial web catalog management.  
Tech Stack: Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, Supabase

### Charcoal Management System
Mobile-First Retail Platform tracking sales pipelines and transactions.  
Tech Stack: Vue 3, Tailwind CSS, Local Storage API
